title: The South Bird Hunt
description: Cricket’s obsession with the lost city of gold and his ancestor’s disgrace gives the Sky Island search emotional weight.
scene: Across pages 22, 23, this scene centers on Mont Blanc Cricket, Masira, Shojo, Luffy, Nami. Cricket’s obsession with the lost city of gold and his ancestor’s disgrace gives the Sky Island search emotional weight.
